subcodes.first_line: O my God! Illumine the eyes of hearts with the light of Thy countenance, O Thou Beloved of all who dwell in the earth and in the heavens! Then make them steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی انر ابصار القلوب بنور وجهک یا محبوب من فی الارضین و السموآت ثم استقم
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world
